title: Explore Our Apartments
subtitle: Luxury, Comfort and Serenity in Tangier

rooms.title: Signature Luxury Suite
rooms.description: Experience excellence in Tangier in our 150 m² Signature Suite at La Teral. This prestigious apartment combines elegance and natural light to offer a refined atmosphere with breathtaking views of the sea and mountains. Perfect for families, it features three spacious, soundproofed bedrooms, one of which includes an elegant and friendly area for your relaxation moments or breakfasts. Share warm moments in our two large modern living rooms or prepare your meals like at home in a state-of-the-art, ultra-equipped kitchen opening onto a sunny terrace. The true luxury? Its two private balconies offering a permanent spectacle over the Mediterranean, the city, and majestic peaks.

rooms.title: Escape of Calm & Comfort
rooms.description: Treat yourself to a peaceful stay in this modern 65 m² apartment, designed for your well-being. Enjoy two cozy bedrooms with hypoallergenic bedding, a bright living room with Smart TV, and a fully equipped kitchen opening onto a sunny terrace, plus a modern bathroom. Every detail, from central air conditioning to perfect soundproofing, has been thought out to offer you total serenity.
features: Bright living room with Smart TV

rooms.title: The Perfect Balance Between Modernity and Serenity
rooms.description: Stay in a modern and refined setting in the heart of Tangier. This spacious apartment welcomes you with two elegant bedrooms featuring hypoallergenic bedding, a bright living room with super comfortable sofas and a Smart TV. Its modern, fully equipped kitchen opens onto a pleasant sunny terrace, while its private balcony offers a breathtaking view of the mountains. An idyllic setting, designed for your family vacations or business trips.
features: Bright living room with Smart TV

rooms.title: The Alliance of Comfort & Warmth
rooms.description: Welcome to a modern and warm setting, designed for your absolute well-being. This spacious 73 m² apartment welcomes you with two cozy bedrooms, featuring hypoallergenic bedding and soundproofed windows to guarantee you completely calm nights. Relax in a light-filled living room or enjoy your equipped kitchen opening onto a private balcony with a breathtaking view. Its contemporary bathroom with a modern shower completes this cocoon of comfort, ideal for your stays in Tangier.

rooms.title: Cozy & Bright
rooms.description: Stay in a modern and soothing setting, ideally located in the heart of Tangier. Apartment No. 5 welcomes you with two comfortable bedrooms designed for your rest, as well as a bright living room equipped with plush sofas and a Smart TV for your relaxation moments. Its fully equipped kitchen and contemporary bathroom with a shower offer all the necessary comfort for a 'home away from home' stay.
features: Bright living room with Smart TV

rooms.title: Elegance & Breathtaking View
rooms.description: Stay in a modern and refined setting in the heart of Tangier. This spacious 73 m² apartment welcomes you with two elegant bedrooms and a bright living room, equipped with super comfortable sofas and a Smart TV for your relaxation moments. Its modern, fully equipped kitchen opens onto a pleasant sunny terrace, while its private balcony offers a breathtaking view of the sea and mountains. Designed for your family vacations or business trips, this haven of peace includes everything you need for a worry-free stay: high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioning, quality linens, and secure parking.
features: Bright living room with Smart TV
Private balcony with breathtaking sea and mountain view

rooms.title: Luxury and Serenity
rooms.description: Treat yourself to an exceptional stay at La Teral Apartment-Hotel, in the heart of Tangier. This elegant 73 m² apartment combines luxury and serenity to accommodate families and business travelers in absolute comfort. The night area consists of two air-conditioned and perfectly soundproofed bedrooms, one of which has a safe and a flat-screen TV. Relax in a modern and warm living room or prepare your meals in a fully equipped kitchen. A real charm asset, the kitchen opens onto a private balcony offering a soothing view of the mountains and the city. A modern bathroom.
features: Private balcony with mountain and city view

rooms.title: Luxury and Serenity
rooms.description: Discover absolute comfort in this modern 65 m² apartment at La Teral. Ideal for families or business trips, this air-conditioned accommodation features two spacious bedrooms with Smart TV and soundproofed windows for total rest. Relax in a bright living room and enjoy a fully equipped kitchen (coffee machine, washing machine, microwave) as well as an elegant bathroom with complimentary toiletries. For a worry-free stay.
features: Equipped kitchen (coffee machine, washing machine, microwave)

included_features: All our apartments include: high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioning, quality hypoallergenic bedding, soundproofed windows, and bath towels
